Reader,
This is a subscription teaser.
We had some 38,000 extra copies printed ofa -
special section we did for Harper’s Magazine
(April 1974). One has been sent to you free as
a sample of our wares. (It cost us about 15
cents apiece to print and send.)
You’re invited to subscribe to The CoEvolution
Quarterly, $6/year (four issues). Order from:
The CQ
558 Santa Cruz Ave
Menlo Park, California 94025
The first issue of The CQ has just been
completed. (Individual copies cost $2 postpaid. )
We’ve never sent a subscription teaser before.
Let us know if you think it’s a bad idea.
Stewart Brand
The WHOLE EARTH EPILOG and The CoEvolution Quarterly
are published by POINT, a California non-profit corporation.
Editorial offices are located at Box 428, Sausalito, Ca. 94965.
